narrative:
New Vienna (precinct in Clinton County) has 676 registered voters, with 55.2% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 35.1% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 9.8%, a pronounced Republican lean of 25.3 percentage points.
